name: Spokeo
manualSteps: Search for your profile on Spokeo
Copy the URL of your listing
Go to the opt-out page and paste the URL
Enter your email address for confirmation
Click the confirmation link sent to your email
notes: Spokeo aggregates data from public records, social networks, and marketing lists. Opt-out removes your current listing but new data may appear from updated public records. Requires periodic re-removal.

name: Whitepages
manualSteps: Search for yourself on Whitepages
Find your listing and click on it
Copy the URL of your profile page
Go to the suppression request page
Paste the profile URL and submit your request
Verify via the phone number on file
notes: Whitepages also operates Whitepages Premium. Removing from free Whitepages does NOT remove from Premium — that requires a separate request. Data may reappear from public record updates.

name: BeenVerified
manualSteps: Go to the BeenVerified opt-out page
Search for your name and state
Select your record from the results
Verify your identity via email
Submit the opt-out request
Removal processes within 24-72 hours
notes: BeenVerified also owns PeopleLooker, NumberGuru, and NeighborWho. Opting out of BeenVerified does NOT opt you out of their subsidiary sites — each must be done separately.

name: Acxiom
manualSteps: Go to the Acxiom opt-out page
Fill in your personal information (name, address, email)
Select the types of data you want removed
Submit the form
Acxiom processes removal within 10 business days
notes: Acxiom (now Liveramp) is one of the largest data brokers globally. They collect data from thousands of sources. Opt-out applies to their consumer-facing database but may not affect data shared with marketing partners before the opt-out.

name: PeopleFinder
manualSteps: Go to the PeopleFinder opt-out page
Search for and identify your listing
Click the opt-out button on your profile
Provide your email address for verification
Click the confirmation link in the verification email
notes: PeopleFinder sources data from public records. Opt-out removes your current listing but data may reappear as public records are updated.

name: Intelius
manualSteps: Go to the Intelius opt-out page
Search for yourself by name and state
Select your record from the results
Provide your email and submit the opt-out request
Click the confirmation link sent to your email
notes: Intelius is owned by PeopleConnect and operates multiple people-search brands including Classmates.com and ZabaSearch. Opting out of Intelius does not automatically opt you out of their partner sites.

name: Radaris
manualSteps: Go to the Radaris privacy control page
You must create a Radaris account to manage your information
Once logged in, search for your profile
Click 'Control Information' on your listing
Select 'Make my profile private' or request full removal
Confirm the privacy changes
notes: Radaris requires creating an account to opt out — a paradoxical requirement to give more data to remove your data. Consider using a disposable email. Known to make the process deliberately cumbersome.

name: MyLife
manualSteps: Submit a CCPA deletion request through the MyLife privacy page
Alternatively, email privacy@mylife.com with your full name and request
You may also call 1-888-704-1900 to request removal by phone
MyLife will process the request within 14 business days
You may be asked to verify your identity before removal
notes: MyLife has faced multiple FTC complaints and lawsuits over deceptive practices. They assign public 'reputation scores' and are known to resist opt-out requests. Phone calls may involve sales pitches for their 'reputation management' service.

name: TruePeopleSearch
manualSteps: Go to the TruePeopleSearch removal page
Search for your name and identify your listing
Click 'Remove This Record'
Complete the CAPTCHA verification
Record is typically removed within 24 hours
notes: One of the simpler opt-out processes among data brokers. No email verification required — just a CAPTCHA. However, data frequently reappears from public record updates and may need periodic re-removal.

name: FastPeopleSearch
manualSteps: Go to the FastPeopleSearch removal page
Search for your listing by name
Click on your record to view it
Click the 'Remove This Record' button
Confirm the removal request
Record is typically removed within 24-48 hours
notes: Similar to TruePeopleSearch in ease of removal. Aggregates data from public records and may re-list after removal. Regular monitoring recommended.
